name: Old Time Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs, buttermilk, and melted lard together.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish measuring 11 inches by 7 inches by 2 inches.
4. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) for approximately 30 minutes.
